prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 13813→14555→13671→18731→26218，整体呈后移趋势，尤其 2024 年较 2023 年后移约 5000 名，2025 年较 2024 年再后移约 7500 名，近两年累计后移约 12500 名；2025 年基准位次约 26218 名，存在一定断档效应；该校在福建省物理类招生计划 2021 年 77 人、2022 年 79 人、2023 年 73 人、2024 年 76 人、2025 年 84 人；2026 年计划 95 人，较 2025 年扩招 11 人（+13.1%），扩招有利于降低竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名 2021 年第 88 名、2022 年第 89 名、2023 年第 88 名、2024 年第 92 名、2025 年第 84 名、2026 年第 89 名，排名稳定在 85–92 区间，属中上水平 211；该校在声誉文件中 2021–2026 年均无显著负面或正面舆情记录，声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第 83 位，评价为「一般」，综合热度约 27.7 万，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；历史投档异常文件中亦无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中长安大学「交通运输工程」获评 A-，为该校唯一 A- 及以上学科，与道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通工程、交通运输、车辆工程等核心招生专业高度对应，是该校最具竞争力的学科标签。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热（2024 年 ），与该校相关招生专业匹配；土木建筑类热度分化观望；福建省物理类考生数从 2021 年 11.7 万持续增长至 2025 年 19.2 万，2026 年总考生约 26.8 万，按近年物理类占比约 76% 估算，物理类考生约 20.4 万，较 2025 年增加约 1.2 万人，竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）2021–2025 年分别为 423→428→431→449→441，波动不大；长安大学位于陕西西安，非福建省内高校，在福建无本地招生倾斜；该校在福建物理类招生占比约 0.04%–0.05%，属跨省常规招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移（断档效应）带来的回弹预期、2026 年扩招 13.1% 的利好、以及福建省物理类考生增加约 1.2 万人带来的竞争加剧，三者相互对冲；扩招和断档回弹略占主导，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅前移（位次数字减小），预测位次约 28078 名，区间 27578–28578 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 28078 名，区间 27578–28578 名。位次在区间下限（27578 名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（华为班、电气、计算机、电子信息）；位次在区间中段建议以二档为主（车辆、机械、道路桥梁、交通类），兼顾一档边缘专业；位次在区间上限附近建议以三档保底（土木、材料、建筑、工商管理），避免盲目冲高。长安大学交通运输工程 A- 学科实力突出，相关专业（道路桥梁、交通工程、交通运输）性价比高，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 13813→14555→13671→18731→26218, showing an overall backward trend. Especially in 2024, it moved back about 5000 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it moved back another 7500 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12500 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 26218, indicating a certain gap effect. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 77 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 73 in 2023, 76 in 2024, and 84 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 95, an increase of 11 students (+13.1%) compared to 2025, which helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its rankings in the Soft Science China University Rankings were 88th in 2021, 89th in 2022, 88th in 2023, 92nd in 2024, 84th in 2025, and 89th in 2026, stable in the 85–92 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The university has no significant negative or positive public opinion records from 2021 to 2026, with a stable reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, and short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no abnormal increase in application attention. There are also no records of gaps in historical admission files. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chang'an University's 'Transportation Engineering' was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline, highly corresponding to core enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, Transportation, and Vehicle Engineering, making it the university's most competitive discipline label.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have sustained high social popularity (2024), matching the university's relevant enrollment majors. The popularity of Civil and Architectural majors is showing divergence and wait-and-see. The number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has continuously increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total number of examinees is about 268,000. Estimated at about 76% Physics Category proportion in recent years, Physics Category examinees are about 204,000, an increase of about 12,000 compared to 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) from 2021 to 2025 was 423→428→431→449→441, with little fluctuation. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a university within Fujian Province, so there is no local admission preference in Fujian. The university's enrollment proportion in Fujian Physics Category is about 0.04%–0.05%, which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound expectation from the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings (gap effect), the positive factor of a 13.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition from an increase of about 12,000 Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province, these three factors offset each other. The enrollment expansion and gap rebound slightly dominate. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025, with a predicted ranking of about 28078, and a range of 27578–28578.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Huawei Class)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information (including Artificial Intelligence)
- Automation (including Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Vehicle Engineering (including Intelligent Vehicles)
- Mechanical (Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering
- Traffic Engineering/Transportation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil (including Civil Engineering)
- Materials
- Architecture (including Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Business Administration
- Engineering Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 28078, with a range of 27578–28578. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (27578) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Huawei Class, Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Vehicle, Mechanical, Road and Bridge, Transportation), while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Civil, Materials, Architecture, Business Administration) to avoid blindly reaching too high. Chang'an University's Transportation Engineering A- discipline strength is outstanding, and related majors (Road and Bridge, Traffic Engineering, Transportation) offer high cost-effectiveness and deserve special attention.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次依次约 2488→2693→2450→3031→3408，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 958 名；2025 年基准位次约 3408 名；该校在福建省历史类招生计划 2021 年 4 人、2022 年 4 人、2023 年 5 人、2024 年 5 人、2025 年 7 人；2026 年计划仅 3 人，较 2025 年大幅缩招 4 人（-57.1%），缩招幅度极大，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为 211、双一流，软科排名稳定在 85–92 区间，属中上水平 211，对文科考生同样具有品牌吸引力；该校声誉平稳，无显著负面舆情；抖音热度一般；历史投档无异常记录；交通运输工程 A- 为该校唯一 A- 及以上学科，与历史类招生专业（法学、行政管理）无直接关联，但学校整体 211 层次对文科生仍有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度偏热（2024 ，评估为「分化观望」），报考竞争激烈；行政管理/公共管理类热度一般；福建省历史类考生数 2021–2025 年分别为 77795→76094→62729→57081→60252，2026 年总考生约 26.8 万，按近年历史类占比约 24% 估算，历史类考生约 6.4 万人，较 2025 年增加约 3700 人；省控线（本科批）2021–2025 年分别为 467→468→453→431→450，波动不大；长安大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校，在福建历史类招生占比极小（约 0.005%–0.01%），属常规跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年历史类招生计划从 7 人骤减至 3 人（缩招 57%）、福建省历史类考生增加约 3700 人，竞争压力显著上升，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年继续后移（位次数字增大），预测位次约 2340 名，区间 1919–2761 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2488→2693→2450→3031→3408, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 958 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3408; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 4 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 3, a sharp reduction of 4 (-57.1%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, with a stable Soft Science ranking in the 85–92 range, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, which also holds brand appeal for liberal arts students; its reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no abnormal historical admission records; Transportation Engineering A- is its only A- or above discipline, which is not directly related to History Category majors (Law, Administrative Management), but the overall 211 status still attracts liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity (2024, assessed as 'divergent wait-and-see'), with fierce competition for admission; Administrative Management/Public Administration categories have average popularity; the number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province from 2021 to 2025 was 77795→76094→62729→57081→60252, with total examinees in 2026 about 268,000, and based on the recent History Category proportion of about 24%, History Category examinees are estimated at about 64,000, an increase of about 3,700 compared to 2025; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) from 2021 to 2025 was 467→468→453→431→450, with little fluctuation; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university, and its History Category enrollment in Fujian is very small (about 0.005%–0.01%), which is a typical cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 History Category enrollment plan sharply reduced from 7 to 3 (a 57% reduction), and the increase of about 3,700 History Category examinees in Fujian Province, competitive pressure rises significantly. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to decline (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted ranking of about 2340, and a range of 1919–2761.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

(Note: In 2026, History Category only recruits 1 for Law and 2 for Administrative Management; Architecture Category is not included in the 2026 plan, but has historical admission records).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2340, with a range of 1919–2761. History Category enrollment plan is only 3 (1 for Law, 2 for Administrative Management), making competition extremely fierce. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1919) can aim for Law; those in the middle of the range should primarily consider Administrative Management; those near the upper limit should be cautious and may consider other 211 universities of similar level. Chang'an University does not have outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines, so liberal arts candidates are advised to weigh professional interests and university level comprehensively.
